name: Infobip Communications API
description: Infobip is an omnichannel communication platform for sending SMS, WhatsApp, Viber, RCS, MMS, and email messages. Use this API to send transactional and promotional messages, manage delivery reports, receive inbound messages, and manage communication resources across multiple channels worldwide.

capabilities.name: sms_send
capabilities.description: Send one or more SMS messages to single or multiple recipients. Supports scheduling, URL shortening, transliteration, and delivery reports.

capabilities.name: sms_send_binary
capabilities.description: Send binary SMS messages containing raw data payloads for specialized use cases like OTA configuration or WAP push.

capabilities.name: sms_preview
capabilities.description: Preview how an SMS message will be segmented and charged without actually sending it.

capabilities.name: sms_delivery_reports_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve delivery reports for previously sent SMS messages. Returns status per recipient including delivered, rejected, or undeliverable.

capabilities.name: sms_logs_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed logs for sent and received SMS messages with filtering by date, status, sender, and destination.

capabilities.name: sms_inbound_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve inbound SMS messages received on your Infobip numbers or keywords.

capabilities.name: sms_scheduled_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the status of a previously scheduled SMS message batch by its bulk ID.

capabilities.name: sms_scheduled_update
capabilities.description: Reschedule or cancel a previously scheduled SMS message batch by its bulk ID.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_send_text
capabilities.description: Send a text message to a WhatsApp user from a registered WhatsApp sender number.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_send_template
capabilities.description: Send a pre-approved WhatsApp template message with optional parameters for personalization.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_send_image
capabilities.description: Send an image message with optional caption to a WhatsApp user.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_send_document
capabilities.description: Send a document file (PDF, DOC, etc.) to a WhatsApp user with optional filename and caption.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_templates_list
capabilities.description: List all registered WhatsApp message templates for your account with their approval status.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_template_create
capabilities.description: Register a new WhatsApp message template for approval by Meta.

capabilities.name: whatsapp_template_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a registered WhatsApp message template by name.

capabilities.name: email_send
capabilities.description: Send a single email or batch of emails with HTML/text content, attachments, and tracking options.

capabilities.name: email_delivery_reports_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve delivery reports for previously sent emails including opens, clicks, bounces, and complaints.

capabilities.name: email_validate
capabilities.description: Validate an email address for correct syntax, domain existence, and deliverability.

capabilities.name: messages_send
capabilities.description: Send a message via the unified Messages API across any supported channel (SMS, WhatsApp, Viber, RCS, etc.) with a single endpoint.
